ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the employee holds */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (if any) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_level" TEXT /* Level of the position (e.g., junior, senior, manager) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the role expires (if applicable) */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, pending, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact preference */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose preferences are being set */,
  "email_preference" INTEGER /* Preference for receiving emails */,
  "phone_preference" INTEGER /* Preference for receiving phone calls */,
  "sms_preference" INTEGER /* Preference for receiving SMS messages */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_preferences_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being communicated with */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone, SMS) */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication used */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication occurred */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., sent, received, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "changed_fields" TEXT /* Fields that were changed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES employees ("email")
)
